{{Citation needed|date=September 2019}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Munakata Shrine (胸肩神社) | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = {{image requested|cat=Hirosaki City}} |location = [[Aomori Prefecture]] [[Hirosaki City]] Shinagawa-cho 89 |ISO = JP-02 |latitude_deg = 40 |latitude_min = 35 |latitude_sec = 40.5 |longitude_deg = 140 |longitude_min = 28 |longitude_sec = 41.0 |deity = {{ublist| {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishimahime|12=draft}} | {{ill|Tagitsuhime|ja|湍津姫命|12=draft}} | {{ill|Tachirahime|ja|田心姫命|1=Tagorihime|12=draft}} }} |sacred_objects = |rank = |founded = {{ill|Daido|ja|大同|12=draft}} 2 (807 CE) |chief_priest = |main_hall = |alternative_names = |pilgrimage_sites = |major_festivals = {{ublist| Evening Festival June 30 | Grand Festival July 1 }} |rituals = |map = Japan Aomori }}
'''Munakata Shrine''' (胸肩神社) is a [[Shinto shrine]] located in [[Hirosaki City]], [[Aomori Prefecture]], Japan.
== Enshrined Deities ==
; Three Goddesses : {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishimahime|12=draft}} : {{ill|Tagitsuhime|ja|湍津姫命|12=draft}} : {{ill|Takiribime|ja|田心姫命|1=Tagorihime|12=draft}} ; Protector of Roads : Guardian of transportation, safe childbirth, fertility, learning, commerce, and industries. ; deity associated with water : Found near springs, rivers, ponds, and the sea. ; Guardian deity for those born in the year of the Dragon or Snake : Before [[Munakata Taisha]] in [[Fukuoka Prefecture]] became the main shrine, the site enshrined Benzaiten. During the [[Meiji era]], the shrine began worshiping Munakata deities, similarly linked to water. Locally, these deities are still referred to as "Benten-sama."
== History ==
* In {{ill|Daido|ja|大同|12=draft}} 2 (807 CE), General {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂|12=draft}} founded the shrine, enshrining Benzaiten at a site called Ōno. * In {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft}} 2 (1662 CE), the shrine was relocated to its current location.
== Festivals ==
The Grand Festival is held annually on July 1, with an Evening Festival the day before on June 30.
The Evening Festival includes various ceremonial and entertainment events.
== Access ==
; Railway : 15-minute walk from {{ill|Hirosaki Station|ja|弘前駅|12=draft}} on the JR Line.
== External Links == * [https://www.muanakta.com/ Official Website]
{{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Pref-stub|pref=Aomori Prefecture}} {{Shinto-stub}}

{{Citation needed|date=September 2019}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Munakata Shrine (胸肩神社) | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = {{image requested|cat=Hirosaki City}} |location = [[Aomori Prefecture]] [[Hirosaki City]] Shinagawa-cho 89 |ISO = JP-02 |latitude_deg = 40 |latitude_min = 35 |latitude_sec = 40.5 |longitude_deg = 140 |longitude_min = 28 |longitude_sec = 41.0 |deity = {{ublist| {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishima-hime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=}} | {{ill|Tagitsuhime|ja|湍津姫命|1=Tagitsuhime|2=ja|3=タギツヒメ|4=zh|5=多岐都比賣命|6=fr|7=Tagitsuhime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|qq=}} | {{ill|Tachirahime|ja|田心姫命|1=Tagorihime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachirahime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagorihime|qq=}} }} |sacred_objects = |Rank = |founded = [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daido]] 2 (807 CE) |chief_priest = |main_hall = |alternative_names = |pilgrimage_sites = |major_festivals = {{ublist| Evening Festival June 30 | Grand Festival July 1 }} |rituals = |map = Japan Aomori }}
'''Munakata Shrine''' (胸肩神社) is a [[Shinto shrine]] located in [[Hirosaki City]], [[Aomori Prefecture]], Japan.
== Enshrined Deities ==
; Three Goddesses : {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishima-hime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=}} : {{ill|Tagitsuhime|ja|湍津姫命|1=Tagitsuhime|2=ja|3=タギツヒメ|4=zh|5=多岐都比賣命|6=fr|7=Tagitsuhime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|qq=}} : {{ill|Takiribime|ja|田心姫命|1=Tagorihime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takiribime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagorihime|qq=}} ; Protector of Roads : Guardian of transportation, safe childbirth, fertility, learning, commerce, and industries. ; deity associated with water : Found near springs, rivers, ponds, and the sea. ; Guardian deity for those born in the year of the Dragon or Snake : Before [[Munakata Taisha]] in [[Fukuoka Prefecture]] became the main shrine, the site enshrined Benzaiten. During the [[Meiji era]], the shrine began worshiping Munakata deities, similarly linked to water. Locally, these deities are still referred to as "Benten-sama."
== History ==
* In [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daido]] 2 (807 CE), General [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro]] founded the shrine, enshrining Benzaiten at a site called Ōno. * In [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 2 (1662 CE), the shrine was relocated to its current location.
== Festivals ==
The Grand Festival is held annually on July 1, with an Evening Festival the day before on June 30.
The Evening Festival includes various ceremonial and entertainment events.
== Access ==
; Railway : 15-minute walk from [[:en:Hirosaki Station|Hirosaki Station]] on the JR Line.
== External Links == * [https://www.muanakta.com/ Official Website]

{{Citation needed|date=September 2019}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Munakata Shrine (胸肩神社) | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = {{image requested|cat=Hirosaki City}} |location = [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]] [[Hirosaki City]] Shinagawa-cho 89 |ISO = JP-02 |latitude_deg = 40 |latitude_min = 35 |latitude_sec = 40.5 |longitude_deg = 140 |longitude_min = 28 |longitude_sec = 41.0 |deity = {{ublist| {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishima-hime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to イチキシマヒメ}} | {{ill|Tagitsuhime|ja|湍津姫命|1=Tagitsuhime|2=ja|3=タギツヒメ|4=zh|5=多岐都比賣命|6=fr|7=Tagitsuhime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|qq=}} | {{ill|Tachirahime|ja|田心姫命|1=Tagorihime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachirahime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagorihime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タキリビメ}} }} |sacred_objects = |Rank = |founded = [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daido]] 2 (807 CE) |chief_priest = |main_hall = |alternative_names = |pilgrimage_sites = |major_festivals = {{ublist| Evening Festival June 30 | Grand Festival July 1 }} |rituals = |map = Japan Aomori }}
'''Munakata Shrine''' (胸肩神社) is a [[Shinto shrine]] located in [[Hirosaki City]], [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]], Japan.
== Enshrined Deities ==
; Three Goddesses : {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishima-hime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to イチキシマヒメ}} : {{ill|Tagitsuhime|ja|湍津姫命|1=Tagitsuhime|2=ja|3=タギツヒメ|4=zh|5=多岐都比賣命|6=fr|7=Tagitsuhime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|qq=}} : {{ill|Takiribime|ja|田心姫命|1=Tagorihime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takiribime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagorihime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タキリビメ}} ; Protector of Roads : Guardian of transportation, safe childbirth, fertility, learning, commerce, and industries. ; deity associated with water : Found near springs, rivers, ponds, and the sea. ; Guardian deity for those born in the year of the Dragon or Snake : Before [[Munakata Taisha]] in [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]] became the main shrine, the site enshrined Benzaiten. During the [[Meiji era]], the shrine began worshiping Munakata deities, similarly linked to water. Locally, these deities are still referred to as "Benten-sama."
== History ==
* In [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daido]] 2 (807 CE), General [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro]] founded the shrine, enshrining Benzaiten at a site called Ōno. * In [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 2 (1662 CE), the shrine was relocated to its current location.
== Festivals ==
The Grand Festival is held annually on July 1, with an Evening Festival the day before on June 30.
The Evening Festival includes various ceremonial and entertainment events.
== Access ==
; Railway : 15-minute walk from [[:en:Hirosaki Station|Hirosaki Station]] on the JR Line.
== External Links == * [https://www.muanakta.com/ Official Website]

'''Munakata Shrine''' (胸肩神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Hirosaki City|Hirosaki City]], [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]], Japan.
== Enshrined Deities ==
; Three Goddesses : {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishima-hime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}} : {{ill|Tagitsuhime|ja|湍津姫命|1=Tagitsuhime|2=ja|3=タギツヒメ|4=zh|5=多岐都比賣命|6=fr|7=Tagitsuhime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|qq=}} : {{ill|Takiribime|ja|田心姫命|1=Tagorihime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takiribime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagorihime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タキリビメ}} ; Protector of Roads : Guardian of transportation, safe childbirth, fertility, learning, commerce, and industries. ; deity associated with water : Found near springs, rivers, ponds, and the sea. ; Guardian deity for those born in the year of the Dragon or Snake : Before [[Munakata Taisha]] in [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]] became the main shrine, the site enshrined Benzaiten. During the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]], the shrine began worshiping Munakata deities, similarly linked to water. Locally, these deities are still referred to as "Benten-sama."
== History ==
* In [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daido]] 2 (807 CE), General [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro]] founded the shrine, enshrining Benzaiten at a site called Ōno. * In [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 2 (1662 CE), the shrine was relocated to its current location.
== Festivals ==
The Grand Festival is held annually on July 1, with an Evening Festival the day before on June 30.
The Evening Festival includes various ceremonial and entertainment events.
== Access ==
; Railway : 15-minute walk from [[:en:Hirosaki Station|Hirosaki Station]] on the JR Line.
== External Links == * [https://www.muanakta.com/ Official Website]

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:21, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:20, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Citation needed|date=September 2019}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Munakata Shrine (胸肩神社) | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = {{image requested|cat=Hirosaki City}} |location = [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]] [[:en:Hirosaki City|Hirosaki City]] Shinagawa-cho 89 |ISO = JP-02 |latitude_deg = 40 |latitude_min = 35 |latitude_sec = 40.5 |longitude_deg = 140 |longitude_min = 28 |longitude_sec = 41.0 |deity = {{ublist| {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishima-hime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}} | {{ill|Tagitsuhime|ja|湍津姫命|1=Tagitsuhime|2=ja|3=タギツヒメ|4=zh|5=多岐都比賣命|6=fr|7=Tagitsuhime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|qq=}} | {{ill|Tachirahime|ja|田心姫命|1=Tagorihime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachirahime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagorihime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タキリビメ}} }} |sacred_objects = |Rank = |founded = [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daido]] 2 (807 CE) |chief_priest = |main_hall = |alternative_names = |pilgrimage_sites = |major_festivals = {{ublist| Evening Festival June 30 | Grand Festival July 1 }} |rituals = |map = Japan Aomori }}
'''Munakata Shrine''' (胸肩神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Hirosaki City|Hirosaki City]], [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]], Japan.
== Enshrined Deities ==
; Three Goddesses : {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishima-hime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}} : {{ill|Tagitsuhime|ja|湍津姫命|1=Tagitsuhime|2=ja|3=タギツヒメ|4=zh|5=多岐都比賣命|6=fr|7=Tagitsuhime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|qq=}} : {{ill|Takiribime|ja|田心姫命|1=Tagorihime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takiribime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagorihime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タキリビメ}} ; Protector of Roads : Guardian of transportation, safe childbirth, fertility, learning, commerce, and industries. ; deity associated with water : Found near springs, rivers, ponds, and the sea. ; Guardian deity for those born in the year of the Dragon or Snake : Before [[Munakata Taisha]] in [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]] became the main shrine, the site enshrined Benzaiten. During the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]], the shrine began worshiping Munakata deities, similarly linked to water. Locally, these deities are still referred to as "Benten-sama."
== History ==
* In [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daido]] 2 (807 CE), General [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro]] founded the shrine, enshrining Benzaiten at a site called Ōno. * In [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 2 (1662 CE), the shrine was relocated to its current location.
== Festivals ==
The Grand Festival is held annually on July 1, with an Evening Festival the day before on June 30.
The Evening Festival includes various ceremonial and entertainment events.
== Access ==
; Railway : 15-minute walk from [[:en:Hirosaki Station|Hirosaki Station]] on the JR Line.
== External Links == * [https://www.muanakta.com/ Official Website]

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:21, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:20, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Citation needed|date=September 2019}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Munakata Shrine (胸肩神社) | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = {{image requested|cat=Hirosaki City}} |location = [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]] [[:en:Hirosaki City|Hirosaki City]] Shinagawa-cho 89 |ISO = JP-02 |latitude_deg = 40 |latitude_min = 35 |latitude_sec = 40.5 |longitude_deg = 140 |longitude_min = 28 |longitude_sec = 41.0 |deity = {{ublist| {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishima-hime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}} | {{ill|Tagitsuhime|ja|湍津姫命|1=Tagitsuhime|2=ja|3=タギツヒメ|4=zh|5=多岐都比賣命|6=fr|7=Tagitsuhime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|qq=}} | {{ill|Tachirahime|ja|田心姫命|1=Tagorihime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachirahime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagorihime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タキリビメ}} }} |sacred_objects = |Rank = |founded = [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daido]] 2 (807 CE) |chief_priest = |main_hall = |alternative_names = |pilgrimage_sites = |major_festivals = {{ublist| Evening Festival June 30 | Grand Festival July 1 }} |rituals = |map = Japan Aomori }}
'''Munakata Shrine''' (胸肩神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Hirosaki City|Hirosaki City]], [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]], Japan.
== Enshrined Deities ==
; Three Goddesses : {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishima-hime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}} : {{ill|Tagitsuhime|ja|湍津姫命|1=Tagitsuhime|2=ja|3=タギツヒメ|4=zh|5=多岐都比賣命|6=fr|7=Tagitsuhime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|qq=}} : {{ill|Takiribime|ja|田心姫命|1=Tagorihime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takiribime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagorihime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タキリビメ}} ; Protector of Roads : Guardian of transportation, safe childbirth, fertility, learning, commerce, and industries. ; deity associated with water : Found near springs, rivers, ponds, and the sea. ; Guardian deity for those born in the year of the Dragon or Snake : Before [[Munakata Taisha]] in [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]] became the main shrine, the site enshrined Benzaiten. During the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]], the shrine began worshiping Munakata deities, similarly linked to water. Locally, these deities are still referred to as "Benten-sama."
== History ==
* In [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daido]] 2 (807 CE), General [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro]] founded the shrine, enshrining Benzaiten at a site called Ōno. * In [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 2 (1662 CE), the shrine was relocated to its current location.
== Festivals ==
The Grand Festival is held annually on July 1, with an Evening Festival the day before on June 30.
The Evening Festival includes various ceremonial and entertainment events.
== Access ==
; Railway : 15-minute walk from [[:en:Hirosaki Station|Hirosaki Station]] on the JR Line.
== External Links == * [https://www.muanakta.com/ Official Website]

revision.comment: 11 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:胸肩神社 (青森県弘前市) up to rev 80488048
revision.text:
{{出典の明記|date=2019年9月}} {{神社 |名称 = 胸肩神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=弘前市}} |所在地 = [[青森県]][[弘前市]]品川町89 |ISO = JP-02 | 緯度度 = 40 |緯度分 = 35 |緯度秒 = 40.5 | 経度度 = 140 |経度分 = 28 |経度秒 = 41.0 |祭神 = {{ublist| [[市杵島姫命]] | [[湍津姫命]] | [[田心姫命]] }} |神体 = |社格 = |創建 = [[大同 (日本)|大同]]2年（[[807年]]） |宮司 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ublist| 宵宮祭 6月30日 | 例大祭 7月1日 }} |神事 = |地図 = Japan Aomori }} '''胸肩神社'''（むなかたじんじゃ）は[[青森県]][[弘前市]]品川町にある[[神社]]である。
== 祭神 == ; 三女神 : [[市杵島姫命]] : [[湍津姫命]] : [[田心姫命]] ; 道を守る神 : 交通、安産、子授け、学問、商売、諸産業、他 ; 水に深い関係のある神 : 水が湧いている所、川、池、海のそば ; 辰巳歳生まれの守り神 : 福岡県[[宗像大社]]が本社以前は弁財天を祀っていたが、明治時代になり同じ水に深い関係のある胸肩の神を祀る。「弁天さま」と呼ばれている。
== 由緒 == * [[大同 (日本)|大同]]2年（[[807年]]）、[[坂上田村麻呂]]将軍が大野という地に信仰していた弁財天を祀り創建。 * [[寛文]]2年（[[1662年]]）、現在地に移転。
== 祭祀 == 毎年7月1日に例大祭、6月30日に宵宮祭が執り行われる。
宵宮祭では様々な神賑行事が行われる。
== 交通 == ; 鉄道 : [[弘前駅|JR弘前駅]]下車 徒歩15分
== 外部リンク == * {{公式サイト|https://www.muanakta.com/}}
{{神道 横}} {{Pref-stub|pref=青森県}} {{Shinto-stub}}
{{デフォルトソート:むなかたしんしや}} [[Category:青森県の神社]] [[Category:弘前市の建築物]] [[Category:弘前市の歴史]]

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:21, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:20, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Citation needed|date=September 2019}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Munakata Shrine (胸肩神社) | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = {{image requested|cat=Hirosaki City}} |location = [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]] [[:en:Hirosaki City|Hirosaki City]] Shinagawa-cho 89 |ISO = JP-02 |latitude_deg = 40 |latitude_min = 35 |latitude_sec = 40.5 |longitude_deg = 140 |longitude_min = 28 |longitude_sec = 41.0 |deity = {{ublist| {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishima-hime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}} | {{ill|Tagitsuhime|ja|湍津姫命|1=Tagitsuhime|2=ja|3=タギツヒメ|4=zh|5=多岐都比賣命|6=fr|7=Tagitsuhime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|qq=}} | {{ill|Tachirahime|ja|田心姫命|1=Tagorihime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachirahime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagorihime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タキリビメ}} }} |sacred_objects = |Rank = |founded = [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daido]] 2 (807 CE) |chief_priest = |main_hall = |alternative_names = |pilgrimage_sites = |major_festivals = {{ublist| Evening Festival June 30 | Grand Festival July 1 }} |rituals = |map = Japan Aomori }}
'''Munakata Shrine''' (胸肩神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Hirosaki City|Hirosaki City]], [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]], Japan.
== Enshrined Deities ==
; Three Goddesses : {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishima-hime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}} : {{ill|Tagitsuhime|ja|湍津姫命|1=Tagitsuhime|2=ja|3=タギツヒメ|4=zh|5=多岐都比賣命|6=fr|7=Tagitsuhime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|qq=}} : {{ill|Takiribime|ja|田心姫命|1=Tagorihime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takiribime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagorihime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タキリビメ}} ; Protector of Roads : Guardian of transportation, safe childbirth, fertility, learning, commerce, and industries. ; deity associated with water : Found near springs, rivers, ponds, and the sea. ; Guardian deity for those born in the year of the Dragon or Snake : Before [[Munakata Taisha]] in [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]] became the main shrine, the site enshrined Benzaiten. During the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]], the shrine began worshiping Munakata deities, similarly linked to water. Locally, these deities are still referred to as "Benten-sama."
== History ==
* In [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daido]] 2 (807 CE), General [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro]] founded the shrine, enshrining Benzaiten at a site called Ōno. * In [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 2 (1662 CE), the shrine was relocated to its current location.
== Festivals ==
The Grand Festival is held annually on July 1, with an Evening Festival the day before on June 30.
The Evening Festival includes various ceremonial and entertainment events.
== Access ==
; Railway : 15-minute walk from [[:en:Hirosaki Station|Hirosaki Station]] on the JR Line.
== External Links == * [https://www.muanakta.com/ Official Website]

'''Munakata Shrine''' (胸肩神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Hirosaki City|Hirosaki City]], [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]], Japan.

== Enshrined Deities ==

; Three Goddesses
: {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishima-hime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}}
: {{ill|Tagitsuhime|ja|湍津姫命|1=Tagitsuhime|2=ja|3=タギツヒメ|4=zh|5=多岐都比賣命|6=fr|7=Tagitsuhime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|qq=}}
: {{ill|Takiribime|ja|田心姫命|1=Tagorihime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takiribime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagorihime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タキリビメ}}
; Protector of Roads
: Guardian of transportation, safe childbirth, fertility, learning, commerce, and industries.
; deity associated with water
: Found near springs, rivers, ponds, and the sea.
; Guardian deity for those born in the year of the Dragon or Snake
: Before [[Munakata Taisha]] in [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]] became the main shrine, the site enshrined Benzaiten. During the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]], the shrine began worshiping Munakata deities, similarly linked to water. Locally, these deities are still referred to as "Benten-sama."

== History ==

* In [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daido]] 2 (807 CE), General [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro]] founded the shrine, enshrining Benzaiten at a site called Ōno.
* In [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 2 (1662 CE), the shrine was relocated to its current location.

== Festivals ==

The Grand Festival is held annually on July 1, with an Evening Festival the day before on June 30.

The Evening Festival includes various ceremonial and entertainment events.

== Access ==

; Railway
: 15-minute walk from [[:en:Hirosaki Station|Hirosaki Station]] on the JR Line.

== External Links ==
* [https://www.muanakta.com/ Official Website]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:胸肩神社 (青森県弘前市)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:21, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:20, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Citation needed|date=September 2019}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Munakata Shrine (胸肩神社) | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = {{image requested|cat=Hirosaki City}} |location = [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]] [[:en:Hirosaki City|Hirosaki City]] Shinagawa-cho 89 |ISO = JP-02 |latitude_deg = 40 |latitude_min = 35 |latitude_sec = 40.5 |longitude_deg = 140 |longitude_min = 28 |longitude_sec = 41.0 |deity = {{ublist| {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishima-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}} | {{ill|Tagitsuhime|ja|湍津姫命|1=Tagitsuhime|2=ja|3=タギツヒメ|4=zh|5=多岐都比賣命|6=fr|7=Tagitsuhime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|qq=}} | {{ill|Tachirahime|ja|田心姫命|1=Tagorihime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachirahime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagorihime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タキリビメ}} }} |sacred_objects = |Rank = |founded = [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daido]] 2 (807 CE) |chief_priest = |main_hall = |alternative_names = |pilgrimage_sites = |major_festivals = {{ublist| Evening Festival June 30 | Grand Festival July 1 }} |rituals = |map = Japan Aomori }}
'''Munakata Shrine''' (胸肩神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Hirosaki City|Hirosaki City]], [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]], Japan.
== Enshrined Deities ==
; Three Goddesses : {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishima-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}} : {{ill|Tagitsuhime|ja|湍津姫命|1=Tagitsuhime|2=ja|3=タギツヒメ|4=zh|5=多岐都比賣命|6=fr|7=Tagitsuhime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|qq=}} : {{ill|Takiribime|ja|田心姫命|1=Tagorihime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takiribime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagorihime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タキリビメ}} ; Protector of Roads : Guardian of transportation, safe childbirth, fertility, learning, commerce, and industries. ; deity associated with water : Found near springs, rivers, ponds, and the sea. ; Guardian deity for those born in the year of the Dragon or Snake : Before [[Munakata Taisha]] in [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]] became the main shrine, the site enshrined Benzaiten. During the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]], the shrine began worshiping Munakata deities, similarly linked to water. Locally, these deities are still referred to as "Benten-sama."
== History ==
* In [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daido]] 2 (807 CE), General [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro]] founded the shrine, enshrining Benzaiten at a site called Ōno. * In [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 2 (1662 CE), the shrine was relocated to its current location.
== Festivals ==
The Grand Festival is held annually on July 1, with an Evening Festival the day before on June 30.
The Evening Festival includes various ceremonial and entertainment events.
== Access ==
; Railway : 15-minute walk from [[:en:Hirosaki Station|Hirosaki Station]] on the JR Line.
== External Links == * [https://www.muanakta.com/ Official Website]

'''Munakata Shrine''' (胸肩神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Hirosaki City|Hirosaki City]], [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]], Japan.
== Enshrined Deities ==
; Three Goddesses : {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishima-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}} : {{ill|Tagitsuhime|ja|湍津姫命|1=Tagitsuhime|2=ja|3=タギツヒメ|4=zh|5=多岐都比賣命|6=fr|7=Tagitsuhime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|qq=}} : {{ill|Takiribime|ja|田心姫命|1=Tagorihime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takiribime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagorihime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タキリビメ}} ; Protector of Roads : Guardian of transportation, safe childbirth, fertility, learning, commerce, and industries. ; deity associated with water : Found near springs, rivers, ponds, and the sea. ; Guardian deity for those born in the year of the Dragon or Snake : Before [[Munakata Taisha]] in [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]] became the main shrine, the site enshrined Benzaiten. During the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]], the shrine began worshiping Munakata deities, similarly linked to water. Locally, these deities are still referred to as "Benten-sama."
== History ==
* In [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daido]] 2 (807 CE), General [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro]] founded the shrine, enshrining Benzaiten at a site called Ōno. * In [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 2 (1662 CE), the shrine was relocated to its current location.
== Festivals ==
The Grand Festival is held annually on July 1, with an Evening Festival the day before on June 30.
The Evening Festival includes various ceremonial and entertainment events.
== Access ==
; Railway : 15-minute walk from [[:en:Hirosaki Station|Hirosaki Station]] on the JR Line.
== External Links == * [https://www.muanakta.com/ Official Website]

'''Munakata Shrine''' (胸肩神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Hirosaki City|Hirosaki City]], [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]], Japan.
== Enshrined Deities ==
; Three Goddesses : {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishima-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}} : {{ill|Tagitsuhime|ja|湍津姫命|1=Tagitsuhime|2=ja|3=タギツヒメ|4=zh|5=多岐都比賣命|6=fr|7=Tagitsuhime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|qq=}} : {{ill|Takiribime|ja|田心姫命|1=Tagorihime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takiribime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagorihime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タキリビメ}} ; Protector of Roads : Guardian of transportation, safe childbirth, fertility, learning, commerce, and industries. ; deity associated with water : Found near springs, rivers, ponds, and the sea. ; Guardian deity for those born in the year of the Dragon or Snake : Before [[Munakata Taisha]] in [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]] became the main shrine, the site enshrined Benzaiten. During the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]], the shrine began worshiping Munakata deities, similarly linked to water. Locally, these deities are still referred to as "Benten-sama."
== History ==
* In [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daido]] 2 (807 CE), General [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro]] founded the shrine, enshrining Benzaiten at a site called Ōno. * In [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 2 (1662 CE), the shrine was relocated to its current location.
== Festivals ==
The Grand Festival is held annually on July 1, with an Evening Festival the day before on June 30.
The Evening Festival includes various ceremonial and entertainment events.
== Access ==
; Railway : 15-minute walk from [[:en:Hirosaki Station|Hirosaki Station]] on the JR Line.
== External Links == * [https://www.muanakta.com/ Official Website]

'''Munakata Shrine''' (胸肩神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} located in [[:en:Hirosaki City|Hirosaki City]], {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|en|Aomori Prefecture|WD=Q71699|lt=Aomori Prefecture}}, Japan.
== Enshrined Deities ==
; Three Goddesses : {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishima-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}} : {{ill|Tagitsuhime|ja|湍津姫命|1=Tagitsuhime|2=ja|3=タギツヒメ|4=zh|5=多岐都比賣命|6=fr|7=Tagitsuhime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|qq=}} : {{ill|Takiribime|ja|田心姫命|1=Tagorihime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takiribime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagorihime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タキリビメ}} ; Protector of Roads : Guardian of transportation, safe childbirth, fertility, learning, commerce, and industries. ; deity associated with water : Found near springs, rivers, ponds, and the sea. ; Guardian deity for those born in the year of the Dragon or Snake : Before [[Munakata Taisha]] in {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|WD=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture}} became the main shrine, the site enshrined Benzaiten. During the {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}}, the shrine began worshiping Munakata deities, similarly linked to water. Locally, these deities are still referred to as "Benten-sama."
== History ==
* In {{ill|Datong (disambiguation)|en|Datong (disambiguation)|WD=Q295082|lt=Daido}} 2 (807 CE), General {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|en|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|WD=Q941979|lt=Sakanoue no Tamuramaro}} founded the shrine, enshrining Benzaiten at a site called Ōno. * In {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|WD=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun}} 2 (1662 CE), the shrine was relocated to its current location.
== Festivals ==
The Grand Festival is held annually on July 1, with an Evening Festival the day before on June 30.
The Evening Festival includes various ceremonial and entertainment events.
== Access ==
; Railway : 15-minute walk from {{ill|Hirosaki Station|en|Hirosaki Station|WD=Q5770722|lt=Hirosaki Station}} on the JR Line.
== External Links == * [https://www.muanakta.com/ Official Website]

{{Citation needed|date=September 2019}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Munakata Shrine (胸肩神社) | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = {{image requested|cat=Hirosaki City}} |location = {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|en|Aomori Prefecture|WD=Q71699|lt=Aomori Prefecture|1=Aomori Prefecture}} [[:en:Hirosaki City|Hirosaki City]] Shinagawa-cho 89 |ISO = JP-02 |latitude_deg = 40 |latitude_min = 35 |latitude_sec = 40.5 |longitude_deg = 140 |longitude_min = 28 |longitude_sec = 41.0 |deity = {{ublist| {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishima-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}} | {{ill|Tagitsuhime|ja|湍津姫命|1=Tagitsuhime|2=ja|3=タギツヒメ|4=zh|5=多岐都比賣命|6=fr|7=Tagitsuhime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|qq=}} | {{ill|Tachirahime|ja|田心姫命|1=Tagorihime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachirahime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagorihime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タキリビメ}} }} |sacred_objects = |Rank = |founded = {{ill|Datong (disambiguation)|en|Datong (disambiguation)|WD=Q295082|lt=Daido|1=Datong (disambiguation)}} 2 (807 CE) |chief_priest = |main_hall = |alternative_names = |pilgrimage_sites = |major_festivals = {{ublist| Evening Festival June 30 | Grand Festival July 1 }} |rituals = |map = Japan Aomori }}
'''Munakata Shrine''' (胸肩神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in [[:en:Hirosaki City|Hirosaki City]], {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|en|Aomori Prefecture|WD=Q71699|lt=Aomori Prefecture|1=Aomori Prefecture}}, Japan.
== Enshrined Deities ==
; Three Goddesses : {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishima-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}} : {{ill|Tagitsuhime|ja|湍津姫命|1=Tagitsuhime|2=ja|3=タギツヒメ|4=zh|5=多岐都比賣命|6=fr|7=Tagitsuhime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|qq=}} : {{ill|Takiribime|ja|田心姫命|1=Tagorihime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takiribime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagorihime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タキリビメ}} ; Protector of Roads : Guardian of transportation, safe childbirth, fertility, learning, commerce, and industries. ; deity associated with water : Found near springs, rivers, ponds, and the sea. ; Guardian deity for those born in the year of the Dragon or Snake : Before [[Munakata Taisha]] in {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|WD=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture|1=Fukuoka Prefecture}} became the main shrine, the site enshrined Benzaiten. During the {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}}, the shrine began worshiping Munakata deities, similarly linked to water. Locally, these deities are still referred to as "Benten-sama."
== History ==
* In {{ill|Datong (disambiguation)|en|Datong (disambiguation)|WD=Q295082|lt=Daido|1=Datong (disambiguation)}} 2 (807 CE), General {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|en|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|WD=Q941979|lt=Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|1=Sakanoue no Tamuramaro}} founded the shrine, enshrining Benzaiten at a site called Ōno. * In {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|WD=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun|1=Kanbun (era)}} 2 (1662 CE), the shrine was relocated to its current location.
== Festivals ==
The Grand Festival is held annually on July 1, with an Evening Festival the day before on June 30.
The Evening Festival includes various ceremonial and entertainment events.
== Access ==
; Railway : 15-minute walk from {{ill|Hirosaki Station|en|Hirosaki Station|WD=Q5770722|lt=Hirosaki Station|1=Hirosaki Station}} on the JR Line.
== External Links == * [https://www.muanakta.com/ Official Website]

The Grand Festival is held annually on July 1, with an Evening Festival the day before on June 30.
The Evening Festival includes various ceremonial and entertainment events.
== Access ==
; Railway : 15-minute walk from {{ill|Hirosaki Station|en|Hirosaki Station|qid=Q5770722|lt=Hirosaki Station|1=Hirosaki Station}} on the JR Line.

{{Citation needed|date=September 2019}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Munakata Shrine (胸肩神社) | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = {{image requested|cat=Hirosaki City}} |location = {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|en|Aomori Prefecture|qid=Q71699|lt=Aomori Prefecture|1=Aomori Prefecture}} [[:en:Hirosaki City|Hirosaki City]] Shinagawa-cho 89 |ISO = JP-02 |latitude_deg = 40 |latitude_min = 35 |latitude_sec = 40.5 |longitude_deg = 140 |longitude_min = 28 |longitude_sec = 41.0 |deity = {{ublist| {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishima-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}} | {{ill|Tagitsuhime|ja|湍津姫命|1=Tagitsuhime|2=ja|3=タギツヒメ|4=zh|5=多岐都比賣命|6=fr|7=Tagitsuhime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|qq=}} | {{ill|Tachirahime|ja|田心姫命|1=Tagorihime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachirahime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagorihime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タキリビメ}} }} |sacred_objects = |Rank = |founded = {{ill|Datong (disambiguation)|en|Datong (disambiguation)|qid=Q295082|lt=Daido|1=Datong (disambiguation)}} 2 (807 CE) |chief_priest = |main_hall = |alternative_names = |pilgrimage_sites = |major_festivals = {{ublist| Evening Festival June 30 | Grand Festival July 1 }} |rituals = |map = Japan Aomori }}
'''Munakata Shrine''' (胸肩神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in [[:en:Hirosaki City|Hirosaki City]], {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|en|Aomori Prefecture|qid=Q71699|lt=Aomori Prefecture|1=Aomori Prefecture}}, Japan.
== Enshrined Deities ==
; Three Goddesses : {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishima-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}} : {{ill|Tagitsuhime|ja|湍津姫命|1=Tagitsuhime|2=ja|3=タギツヒメ|4=zh|5=多岐都比賣命|6=fr|7=Tagitsuhime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|qq=}} : {{ill|Takiribime|ja|田心姫命|1=Tagorihime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takiribime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagorihime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タキリビメ}} ; Protector of Roads : Guardian of transportation, safe childbirth, fertility, learning, commerce, and industries. ; deity associated with water : Found near springs, rivers, ponds, and the sea. ; Guardian deity for those born in the year of the Dragon or Snake : Before [[Munakata Taisha]] in {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|qid=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture|1=Fukuoka Prefecture}} became the main shrine, the site enshrined Benzaiten. During the {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}}, the shrine began worshiping Munakata deities, similarly linked to water. Locally, these deities are still referred to as "Benten-sama."
== History ==
* In {{ill|Datong (disambiguation)|en|Datong (disambiguation)|qid=Q295082|lt=Daido|1=Datong (disambiguation)}} 2 (807 CE), General {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|en|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|qid=Q941979|lt=Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|1=Sakanoue no Tamuramaro}} founded the shrine, enshrining Benzaiten at a site called Ōno. * In {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|qid=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun|1=Kanbun (era)}} 2 (1662 CE), the shrine was relocated to its current location.
== Festivals ==
The Grand Festival is held annually on July 1, with an Evening Festival the day before on June 30.
The Evening Festival includes various ceremonial and entertainment events.
== Access ==
; Railway : 15-minute walk from {{ill|Hirosaki Station|en|Hirosaki Station|qid=Q5770722|lt=Hirosaki Station|1=Hirosaki Station}} on the JR Line.
